I14Y 0.2.0
  • Home
  • Reference
  • News

Discovering the I14Y catalog

Source: vignettes/discovering-the-catalog.Rmd
discovering-the-catalog.Rmd

I14Y exposes two complementary ways to discover resources:

  • i14y_search() — full-text search with facets (publisher, theme, registration status, …), returns a flat tibble of resource summaries.
  • i14y_list_*() — flat list endpoints, one per resource type, with identifier-style filters (publisherIdentifier, version, …).

This vignette walks through both, then shows how to export catalog metadata in DCAT for downstream tools.

library(I14Y)
library(dplyr)
#> 
#> Attaching package: 'dplyr'
#> The following objects are masked from 'package:stats':
#> 
#>     filter, lag
#> The following objects are masked from 'package:base':
#> 
#>     intersect, setdiff, setequal, union

Faceted search across all resource types

i14y_search() covers everything: datasets, data services, public services, concepts, mapping tables.

i14y_search(query = "education", language = "en") |>
  glimpse()
#> Rows: 272
#> Columns: 65
#> $ businessEvents                       <list> [<data.frame[0 x 0]>], [<data.fr…
#> $ formats                              <list> [<data.frame[0 x 0]>], [<data.fr…
#> $ id                                   <chr> "88c4c883-e87c-489c-82a4-b9e8d413…
#> $ identifier                           <chr> "EDUCA_EDULOG", "RPS", "educa_nav…
#> $ lifeEvents                           <list> [<data.frame[3 x 5]>], [<data.fr…
#> $ publicationLevel                     <chr> "Public", "Public", "Public", "Pu…
#> $ registrationStatus                   <chr> "Recorded", "Recorded", "Recorded…
#> $ themes                               <list> [<data.frame[8 x 5]>], [<data.fr…
#> $ type                                 <chr> "PublicService", "PublicService",…
#> $ structure                            <chr> NA, NA, "WithoutStructure", "With…
#> $ version                              <chr> NA, NA, "1.1", NA, "1.0.0", "4.0.…
#> $ conceptType                          <chr> NA, NA, NA, NA, "CodeList", "Code…
#> $ validFrom                            <chr> NA, NA, NA, NA, "2024-05-07T22:00…
#> $ structureReferencesCount             <int> NA, NA, NA, NA, 0, 0, NA, NA, NA,…
#> $ description.de                       <chr> "Im Auftrag der Kantone vereinfac…
#> $ description.en                       <chr> "On behalf of the Swiss cantons, …
#> $ description.fr                       <chr> "Sur mandat des cantons, Edulog s…
#> $ description.it                       <chr> "Su mandato dei cantoni, Edulog s…
#> $ publisher.homePage                   <chr> "https://www.educa.ch", "https://…
#> $ publisher.id                         <chr> "67219342-70fe-4d0b-9a80-ef659c14…
#> $ publisher.identifier                 <chr> "CH_EDUCA", "CH_BAG", "CH_EDUCA",…
#> $ publisher.spatial                    <list> "CH", "CH", "CH", "LU", "CH", "C…
#> $ publisher.spatialCH                  <list> [<data.frame[1 x 6]>], [<data.fr…
#> $ publisher.subAgents                  <list> [<data.frame[0 x 0]>], [<data.fr…
#> $ publisher.uid                        <chr> NA, "CHE467023568", NA, "CHE11239…
#> $ publisher.classification.code        <chr> "0224", "0220", "0224", "0117", N…
#> $ publisher.classification.name.de     <chr> "Andere öffentlich-rechtliche Ver…
#> $ publisher.classification.name.en     <chr> "Other public-law administrative …
#> $ publisher.classification.name.fr     <chr> "Autre unité de l’administration …
#> $ publisher.classification.name.it     <chr> "Altra unità amministrativa di di…
#> $ publisher.contactPoint.hasEmail      <chr> "info@educa.ch", "info@bag.admin.…
#> $ publisher.contactPoint.hasTelephone  <chr> "+41 31 300 55 00", "+41 58 46467…
#> $ publisher.contactPoint.kind          <chr> "Organization", "Organization", "…
#> $ publisher.contactPoint.hasAddress.de <chr> "Erlachstrasse 21, 3012, Bern, BE…
#> $ publisher.contactPoint.hasAddress.en <chr> "Erlachstrasse 21, 3012, Bern, BE…
#> $ publisher.contactPoint.hasAddress.fr <chr> "Erlachstrasse 21, 3012, Bern, BE…
#> $ publisher.contactPoint.hasAddress.it <chr> "Erlachstrasse 21, 3012, Bern, BE…
#> $ publisher.contactPoint.hasAddress.rm <chr> NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, N…
#> $ publisher.description.de             <chr> "Als Fachagentur im Auftrag von B…
#> $ publisher.description.en             <chr> "As a specialist agency commissio…
#> $ publisher.description.fr             <chr> "En tant qu'agence spécialisée ma…
#> $ publisher.description.it             <chr> "In qualità di agenzia specializz…
#> $ publisher.name.de                    <chr> "Educa", "Bundesamt für Gesundhei…
#> $ publisher.name.en                    <chr> "Educa", "Federal Office of Publi…
#> $ publisher.name.fr                    <chr> "Educa", "Office fédéral de la sa…
#> $ publisher.name.it                    <chr> "Educa", "Ufficio federale della …
#> $ publisher.prefLabel.de               <chr> "EDUCA", "BAG", "EDUCA", "LUSTAT"…
#> $ publisher.prefLabel.en               <chr> "EDUCA", "FOPH", "EDUCA", "LUSTAT…
#> $ publisher.prefLabel.fr               <chr> "EDUCA", "OFSP", "EDUCA", "LUSTAT…
#> $ publisher.prefLabel.it               <chr> "EDUCA", "UFSP", "EDUCA", "LUSTAT…
#> $ publisher.system.createdAt           <chr> "0001-01-01T00:00:00+00:00", "000…
#> $ publisher.system.modifiedAt          <chr> "2026-03-12T10:10:12.76855+00:00"…
#> $ system.createdAt                     <chr> "0001-01-01T00:00:00+00:00", "000…
#> $ system.modifiedAt                    <chr> "2025-02-17T15:34:02+00:00", "202…
#> $ system.creationType                  <chr> NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, "Automate…
#> $ title.de                             <chr> "Edulog – die Föderation der Iden…
#> $ title.en                             <chr> "Edulog - the Federation of Ident…
#> $ title.fr                             <chr> "Edulog – la Fédération des servi…
#> $ title.it                             <chr> "Edulog - la federazione dei serv…
#> $ accessRights.code                    <chr> NA, NA, "PUBLIC", "PUBLIC", NA, N…
#> $ accessRights.uri                     <chr> NA, NA, "http://publications.euro…
#> $ accessRights.name.de                 <chr> NA, NA, "Öffentlich", "Öffentlich…
#> $ accessRights.name.en                 <chr> NA, NA, "Public", "Public", NA, N…
#> $ accessRights.name.fr                 <chr> NA, NA, "Public", "Public", NA, N…
#> $ accessRights.name.it                 <chr> NA, NA, "Pubblico", "Pubblico", N…

Filter by resource type:

i14y_search(
  language = "en",
  types = c("DataService")
) |>
  glimpse()
#> Rows: 76
#> Columns: 60
#> $ businessEvents                       <list> [], [], [], [], [], [], [], [], …
#> $ formats                              <list> [], [], [], [], [], [], [], [], …
#> $ id                                   <chr> "08b7a45f-c18f-4a5e-b936-2f08502c…
#> $ identifier                           <chr> "08b7a45f-c18f-4a5e-b936-2f08502c…
#> $ lifeEvents                           <list> [], [], [], [], [], [], [], [], …
#> $ publicationLevel                     <chr> "Public", "Public", "Public", "Pu…
#> $ registrationStatus                   <chr> "Recorded", "Recorded", "Recorded…
#> $ themes                               <list> [<data.frame[3 x 5]>], [<data.fr…
#> $ type                                 <chr> "DataService", "DataService", "Da…
#> $ version                              <chr> "1.0", "1.2.0", "1.1.0", NA, "1.0…
#> $ accessRights.code                    <chr> "RESTRICTED", "NON_PUBLIC", "NON_…
#> $ accessRights.uri                     <chr> "http://publications.europa.eu/re…
#> $ accessRights.name.de                 <chr> "Eingeschränkt", "Nicht-öffentlic…
#> $ accessRights.name.en                 <chr> "Restricted", "Non-public", "Non-…
#> $ accessRights.name.fr                 <chr> "Restreint", "Non publique", "Non…
#> $ accessRights.name.it                 <chr> "Ristretto", "Non pubblico", "Non…
#> $ description.de                       <chr> "VOSTRA stellt externen Behörden …
#> $ description.en                       <chr> "VOSTRA provides external authori…
#> $ description.fr                       <chr> "VOSTRA met à la disposition des …
#> $ description.it                       <chr> "VOSTRA mette a disposizione dell…
#> $ publisher.id                         <chr> "28212168-8cc5-4b0c-9ed2-541654dc…
#> $ publisher.identifier                 <chr> "CH_BJ", "CH_BIT_SAP", "CH_BIT_SA…
#> $ publisher.spatial                    <list> "CH", <>, <>, "CH", "CH", <>, "C…
#> $ publisher.spatialCH                  <list> [<data.frame[1 x 6]>], [<data.fr…
#> $ publisher.subAgents                  <list> [<data.frame[0 x 0]>], [<data.fr…
#> $ publisher.uid                        <chr> "CHE378338277", "CHE221032573", "…
#> $ publisher.homePage                   <chr> NA, NA, NA, "https://www.swisstop…
#> $ publisher.classification.code        <chr> "0220", "0220", "0220", "0220", "…
#> $ publisher.classification.name.de     <chr> "Verwaltungseinheit des Bundes", …
#> $ publisher.classification.name.en     <chr> "Administrative unit of the Confe…
#> $ publisher.classification.name.fr     <chr> "Unité de l’administration fédéra…
#> $ publisher.classification.name.it     <chr> "Unità amministrativa della Confe…
#> $ publisher.contactPoint.hasEmail      <chr> "info@bj.admin.ch", "info@bit.adm…
#> $ publisher.contactPoint.kind          <chr> "Organization", "Organization", "…
#> $ publisher.contactPoint.hasTelephone  <chr> NA, NA, NA, NA, "+41 58 4646700",…
#> $ publisher.contactPoint.hasAddress.de <chr> "Bundesrain 20, 3005 Bern, BE", "…
#> $ publisher.contactPoint.hasAddress.en <chr> "Bundesrain 20, 3005 Bern, BE", "…
#> $ publisher.contactPoint.hasAddress.fr <chr> "Bundesrain 20, 3005 Bern, BE", "…
#> $ publisher.contactPoint.hasAddress.it <chr> "Bundesrain 20, 3005 Bern, BE", "…
#> $ publisher.contactPoint.hasAddress.rm <chr> NA, "Eichenweg 3, 3052 Zollikofen…
#> $ publisher.name.de                    <chr> "Bundesamt für Justiz (BJ)", "Bun…
#> $ publisher.name.en                    <chr> "Federal Office of Justice (FOI)"…
#> $ publisher.name.fr                    <chr> "Office fédéral de la justice (OF…
#> $ publisher.name.it                    <chr> "Ufficio federale di giustizia (U…
#> $ publisher.prefLabel.de               <chr> "BJ", "BIT (SAP)", "BIT (SAP)", "…
#> $ publisher.prefLabel.en               <chr> "FOI", "FOITT (SAP)", "FOITT (SAP…
#> $ publisher.prefLabel.fr               <chr> "OFJ", "OFIT (SAP)", "OFIT (SAP)"…
#> $ publisher.prefLabel.it               <chr> "UFG", "UFIT (SAP)", "UFIT (SAP)"…
#> $ publisher.system.createdAt           <chr> "0001-01-01T00:00:00+00:00", "202…
#> $ publisher.system.modifiedAt          <chr> "2025-08-20T15:07:48.875657+00:00…
#> $ publisher.description.de             <chr> NA, NA, NA, NA, "Das BAG engagier…
#> $ publisher.description.en             <chr> NA, NA, NA, NA, "The Federal Offi…
#> $ publisher.description.fr             <chr> NA, NA, NA, NA, "L’OFSP s’engage …
#> $ publisher.description.it             <chr> NA, NA, NA, NA, "L’UFSP si impegn…
#> $ system.createdAt                     <chr> "0001-01-01T00:00:00+00:00", "202…
#> $ system.modifiedAt                    <chr> "2024-12-12T14:39:37+00:00", "202…
#> $ title.de                             <chr> "Webservice Personabfrage VOSTRA"…
#> $ title.en                             <chr> "VOSTRA person search web service…
#> $ title.fr                             <chr> "Service web de recherche de pers…
#> $ title.it                             <chr> "Servizio web per ricerche di per…

Filter by publisher and theme — the values come from the I14Y vocabularies (visible in any search result’s publisher.identifier / themes fields). For example, the Federal Statistical Office has publisher identifier CH1, and the theme code 115 is “Economy”:

i14y_search(
  language = "en",
  publishers = "CH1",
  themes = "115",
  pageSize = 10
) |>
  glimpse()
#> Rows: 10
#> Columns: 60
#> $ businessEvents                       <list> [], [], [], [], [], [], [], [], …
#> $ formats                              <list> [], [], [], [], [], [], [], [], …
#> $ id                                   <chr> "0014fac8-9a9c-40be-b23a-d93c4a68…
#> $ identifier                           <chr> "23326589@bundesamt-fur-statistik…
#> $ lifeEvents                           <list> [], [], [], [], [], [], [], [], …
#> $ publicationLevel                     <chr> "Public", "Public", "Public", "Pu…
#> $ registrationStatus                   <chr> "Recorded", "Recorded", "Recorded…
#> $ structure                            <chr> "WithoutStructure", "WithStructur…
#> $ themes                               <list> [<data.frame[3 x 5]>], [<data.fr…
#> $ type                                 <chr> "Dataset", "Dataset", "Dataset", …
#> $ accessRights.code                    <chr> "PUBLIC", "PUBLIC", "PUBLIC", "PU…
#> $ accessRights.uri                     <chr> "http://publications.europa.eu/re…
#> $ accessRights.name.de                 <chr> "Öffentlich", "Öffentlich", "Öffe…
#> $ accessRights.name.en                 <chr> "Public", "Public", "Public", "Pu…
#> $ accessRights.name.fr                 <chr> "Public", "Public", "Public", "Pu…
#> $ accessRights.name.it                 <chr> "Pubblico", "Pubblico", "Pubblico…
#> $ description.de                       <chr> "Dieses Dataset präsentiert die Q…
#> $ description.en                       <chr> "This dataset presents the quarte…
#> $ description.fr                       <chr> "Ce dataset présente les données …
#> $ description.it                       <chr> "Questo dataset presenta i dati t…
#> $ publisher.homePage                   <chr> "https://bfs.admin.ch", "https://…
#> $ publisher.id                         <chr> "a88d610b-62f9-4e45-b288-3b23ff4f…
#> $ publisher.identifier                 <chr> "CH1", "CH1", "CH1", "CH1", "CH1"…
#> $ publisher.spatial                    <list> "CH", "CH", "CH", "CH", "CH", "C…
#> $ publisher.spatialCH                  <list> [<data.frame[1 x 6]>], [<data.fr…
#> $ publisher.subAgents                  <list> [<data.frame[3 x 5]>], [<data.fr…
#> $ publisher.uid                        <chr> "CHE131608474", "CHE131608474", "…
#> $ publisher.classification.code        <chr> "0220", "0220", "0220", "0220", "…
#> $ publisher.classification.name.de     <chr> "Verwaltungseinheit des Bundes", …
#> $ publisher.classification.name.en     <chr> "Administrative unit of the Confe…
#> $ publisher.classification.name.fr     <chr> "Unité de l’administration fédéra…
#> $ publisher.classification.name.it     <chr> "Unità amministrativa della Confe…
#> $ publisher.contactPoint.hasEmail      <chr> "info@bfs.admin.ch", "info@bfs.ad…
#> $ publisher.contactPoint.hasTelephone  <chr> "+41 58 463 60 11", "+41 58 463 6…
#> $ publisher.contactPoint.kind          <chr> "Organization", "Organization", "…
#> $ publisher.contactPoint.hasAddress.de <chr> "Espace de l'Europe 10, 2010 Neuc…
#> $ publisher.contactPoint.hasAddress.en <chr> "Espace de l'Europe 10, 2010 Neuc…
#> $ publisher.contactPoint.hasAddress.fr <chr> "Espace de l'Europe 10, 2010 Neuc…
#> $ publisher.contactPoint.hasAddress.it <chr> "Espace de l'Europe 10, 2010 Neuc…
#> $ publisher.description.de             <chr> "Das BFS ist das nationale Kompet…
#> $ publisher.description.en             <chr> "The FSO is Switzerland's nationa…
#> $ publisher.description.fr             <chr> "L'OFS est le centre de compétenc…
#> $ publisher.description.it             <chr> "L’UST è il centro di competenza …
#> $ publisher.name.de                    <chr> "Bundesamt für Statistik (BFS)", …
#> $ publisher.name.en                    <chr> "Federal Statistical Office (FSO)…
#> $ publisher.name.fr                    <chr> "Office Fédéral de la Statistique…
#> $ publisher.name.it                    <chr> "Ufficio federale di statistica (…
#> $ publisher.prefLabel.de               <chr> "BFS", "BFS", "BFS", "BFS", "BFS"…
#> $ publisher.prefLabel.en               <chr> "FSO", "FSO", "FSO", "FSO", "FSO"…
#> $ publisher.prefLabel.fr               <chr> "OFS", "OFS", "OFS", "OFS", "OFS"…
#> $ publisher.prefLabel.it               <chr> "UFS", "UFS", "UFS", "UFS", "UFS"…
#> $ publisher.system.createdAt           <chr> "0001-01-01T00:00:00+00:00", "000…
#> $ publisher.system.modifiedAt          <chr> "2025-12-03T15:03:48.012554+00:00…
#> $ system.createdAt                     <chr> "2026-05-19T11:42:32+00:00", "202…
#> $ system.creationType                  <chr> "Automated", "Automated", "Automa…
#> $ system.modifiedAt                    <chr> "2026-05-19T11:42:34+00:00", "202…
#> $ title.de                             <chr> "Indikator der Beschäftigungsauss…
#> $ title.en                             <chr> "Index of employment evolution pr…
#> $ title.fr                             <chr> "Indicateur des prévisions d'évol…
#> $ title.it                             <chr> "Indicatore delle prospettive d'i…

Restrict to datasets that actually have a published structure:

i14y_search(
  types = "Dataset",
  structure = "WithStructure",
  pageSize = 10
) |>
  glimpse()
#> Rows: 10
#> Columns: 61
#> $ businessEvents                       <list> [], [], [], [], [], [], [], [], …
#> $ formats                              <list> [<data.frame[0 x 0]>], [<data.fr…
#> $ id                                   <chr> "003f8e0f-b024-4839-8279-8c6c6024…
#> $ identifier                           <chr> "36344769@bundesamt-fur-statistik…
#> $ lifeEvents                           <list> [], [], [], [], [], [], [], [], …
#> $ publicationLevel                     <chr> "Public", "Public", "Public", "Pu…
#> $ registrationStatus                   <chr> "Recorded", "Recorded", "Recorded…
#> $ structure                            <chr> "WithStructure", "WithStructure",…
#> $ themes                               <list> [<data.frame[1 x 5]>], [<data.fr…
#> $ type                                 <chr> "Dataset", "Dataset", "Dataset", …
#> $ accessRights.code                    <chr> "PUBLIC", "PUBLIC", "PUBLIC", "PU…
#> $ accessRights.uri                     <chr> "http://publications.europa.eu/re…
#> $ accessRights.name.de                 <chr> "Öffentlich", "Öffentlich", "Öffe…
#> $ accessRights.name.en                 <chr> "Public", "Public", "Public", "Pu…
#> $ accessRights.name.fr                 <chr> "Public", "Public", "Public", "Pu…
#> $ accessRights.name.it                 <chr> "Pubblico", "Pubblico", "Pubblico…
#> $ description.de                       <chr> "Dieses Dataset präsentiert die j…
#> $ description.fr                       <chr> "Ce dataset présente le compte d'…
#> $ description.it                       <chr> NA, NA, "Questo dataset presenta …
#> $ description.en                       <chr> NA, NA, NA, "Descriptions of the …
#> $ publisher.homePage                   <chr> "https://bfs.admin.ch", "https://…
#> $ publisher.id                         <chr> "a88d610b-62f9-4e45-b288-3b23ff4f…
#> $ publisher.identifier                 <chr> "CH1", "CH1", "CH1", "CH1", "CH1"…
#> $ publisher.spatial                    <list> "CH", "CH", "CH", "CH", "CH", "C…
#> $ publisher.spatialCH                  <list> [<data.frame[1 x 6]>], [<data.fr…
#> $ publisher.subAgents                  <list> [<data.frame[3 x 5]>], [<data.fr…
#> $ publisher.uid                        <chr> "CHE131608474", "CHE131608474", "…
#> $ publisher.classification.code        <chr> "0220", "0220", "0220", "0220", "…
#> $ publisher.classification.name.de     <chr> "Verwaltungseinheit des Bundes", …
#> $ publisher.classification.name.en     <chr> "Administrative unit of the Confe…
#> $ publisher.classification.name.fr     <chr> "Unité de l’administration fédéra…
#> $ publisher.classification.name.it     <chr> "Unità amministrativa della Confe…
#> $ publisher.contactPoint.hasEmail      <chr> "info@bfs.admin.ch", "info@bfs.ad…
#> $ publisher.contactPoint.hasTelephone  <chr> "+41 58 463 60 11", "+41 58 463 6…
#> $ publisher.contactPoint.kind          <chr> "Organization", "Organization", "…
#> $ publisher.contactPoint.hasAddress.de <chr> "Espace de l'Europe 10, 2010 Neuc…
#> $ publisher.contactPoint.hasAddress.en <chr> "Espace de l'Europe 10, 2010 Neuc…
#> $ publisher.contactPoint.hasAddress.fr <chr> "Espace de l'Europe 10, 2010 Neuc…
#> $ publisher.contactPoint.hasAddress.it <chr> "Espace de l'Europe 10, 2010 Neuc…
#> $ publisher.contactPoint.hasAddress.rm <chr> NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, "…
#> $ publisher.description.de             <chr> "Das BFS ist das nationale Kompet…
#> $ publisher.description.en             <chr> "The FSO is Switzerland's nationa…
#> $ publisher.description.fr             <chr> "L'OFS est le centre de compétenc…
#> $ publisher.description.it             <chr> "L’UST è il centro di competenza …
#> $ publisher.name.de                    <chr> "Bundesamt für Statistik (BFS)", …
#> $ publisher.name.en                    <chr> "Federal Statistical Office (FSO)…
#> $ publisher.name.fr                    <chr> "Office Fédéral de la Statistique…
#> $ publisher.name.it                    <chr> "Ufficio federale di statistica (…
#> $ publisher.prefLabel.de               <chr> "BFS", "BFS", "BFS", "BFS", "BFS"…
#> $ publisher.prefLabel.en               <chr> "FSO", "FSO", "FSO", "FSO", "FSO"…
#> $ publisher.prefLabel.fr               <chr> "OFS", "OFS", "OFS", "OFS", "OFS"…
#> $ publisher.prefLabel.it               <chr> "UFS", "UFS", "UFS", "UFS", "UFS"…
#> $ publisher.system.createdAt           <chr> "0001-01-01T00:00:00+00:00", "000…
#> $ publisher.system.modifiedAt          <chr> "2025-12-03T15:03:48.012554+00:00…
#> $ system.createdAt                     <chr> "2026-05-19T11:56:42+00:00", "202…
#> $ system.creationType                  <chr> "Automated", "Automated", "Automa…
#> $ system.modifiedAt                    <chr> "2026-05-19T11:56:44+00:00", "202…
#> $ title.de                             <chr> "Betriebsrechnung - Abfluss für L…
#> $ title.fr                             <chr> "Compte d'exploitation - Dépenses…
#> $ title.it                             <chr> NA, NA, "Creazioni, cessazioni e …
#> $ title.en                             <chr> NA, NA, NA, "Length of roads (wit…

List endpoints, one per resource type

When you know the resource type and want to filter by identifier metadata instead of full-text, use the list endpoints.

Datasets 

i14y_list_datasets(page = 1, pageSize = 10) |>
  glimpse()
#> Rows: 10
#> Columns: 76
#> $ conformsTo                       <list> [], [], [], [], [], [], [], [], [], …
#> $ contactPoints                    <list> [<data.frame[1 x 13]>], [<data.frame…
#> $ distributions                    <list> [<data.frame[4 x 31]>], [<data.frame…
#> $ documentation                    <list> [<data.frame[0 x 0]>], [<data.frame[…
#> $ geoIvIds                         <list> [], [], [], [], [], [], [], [], [], …
#> $ id                               <chr> "0004d8ac-ddc5-4612-adc0-cf4ac87ab636…
#> $ identifiers                      <list> "36355040@bundesamt-fur-statistik-bf…
#> $ images                           <list> [], [], [], [], [], [], [], [], [], …
#> $ isReferencedBy                   <list> [], [], [], [], [], [], [], [], [], …
#> $ issued                           <chr> "2026-01-27T08:30:00+01:00", "2022-09…
#> $ keywords                         <list> [<data.frame[5 x 5]>], [<data.frame[…
#> $ landingPages                     <list> [<data.frame[1 x 1]>], [<data.frame[…
#> $ languages                        <list> [<data.frame[4 x 6]>], [<data.frame[…
#> $ publicationLevel                 <chr> "Public", "Public", "Public", "Public…
#> $ qualifiedAttributions            <list> [], [], [], [], [], [], [], [], [], …
#> $ qualifiedRelations               <list> [], [], [], [], [], [], [], [], [], …
#> $ registrationStatus               <chr> "Recorded", "Recorded", "Recorded", "…
#> $ relations                        <list> [<data.frame[1 x 1]>], [<data.frame[…
#> $ spatial                          <list> <"Raum mit städtischem Charakter", "…
#> $ temporalCoverage                 <list> [], [], [], [], [], [], [], [], [], …
#> $ themes                           <list> [<data.frame[0 x 0]>], [<data.frame[…
#> $ version                          <chr> NA, NA, NA, NA, "1", "1", NA, NA, NA,…
#> $ accessRights.code                <chr> "PUBLIC", "PUBLIC", "PUBLIC", "PUBLIC…
#> $ accessRights.uri                 <chr> "http://publications.europa.eu/resour…
#> $ accessRights.name.de             <chr> "Öffentlich", "Öffentlich", "Öffentli…
#> $ accessRights.name.en             <chr> "Public", "Public", "Public", "Public…
#> $ accessRights.name.fr             <chr> "Public", "Public", "Public", "Public…
#> $ accessRights.name.it             <chr> "Pubblico", "Pubblico", "Pubblico", "…
#> $ description.de                   <chr> "Dieses Dataset präsentiert jährliche…
#> $ description.en                   <chr> "Dieses Dataset präsentiert jährliche…
#> $ description.fr                   <chr> "Ce dataset présente des données annu…
#> $ description.it                   <chr> "Ce dataset présente des données annu…
#> $ frequency.code                   <chr> "ANNUAL", "QUARTERLY", "ANNUAL", "ANN…
#> $ frequency.uri                    <chr> "http://publications.europa.eu/resour…
#> $ frequency.name.de                <chr> "jährlich", "vierteljährlich", "jährl…
#> $ frequency.name.en                <chr> "annual", "quarterly", "annual", "ann…
#> $ frequency.name.fr                <chr> "annuel", "trimestriel", "annuel", "a…
#> $ frequency.name.it                <chr> "annuale", "trimestrale", "annuale", …

#> $ publisher.id                     <chr> "a88d610b-62f9-4e45-b288-3b23ff4f1758…
#> $ publisher.identifier             <chr> "CH1", "CH1", "CH1", "CH1", "CH_BAZG"…
#> $ publisher.spatial                <list> "CH", "CH", "CH", "CH", "CH", "CH", …
#> $ publisher.spatialCH              <list> [<data.frame[1 x 6]>], [<data.frame[…

Data services 

i14y_list_dataservices(page = 1, pageSize = 10) |>
  glimpse()
#> Rows: 10
#> Columns: 64
#> $ conformsTo                       <list> [<data.frame[1 x 4]>], [<data.frame[…

Public services 

i14y_list_publicservices(page = 1, pageSize = 10) |>
  glimpse()

#> Columns: 53

Mapping tables 

i14y_list_mappingtables(page = 1, pageSize = 10) |>
  glimpse()
#> Rows: 1
#> Columns: 37
#> $ conformsTo                       <list> []
#> $ id                               <chr> "703b7365-5090-4247-ad70-ae98cbc77df6"
#> $ identifiers                      <list> "mapping-geo-focus-iso-3166-1"
#> $ keywords                         <list> []
#> $ publicationLevel                 <chr> "Public"
#> $ registrationStatus               <chr> "Incomplete"
#> $ themes                           <list> []
#> $ validFrom                        <chr> "2026-04-26T22:00:00+00:00"
#> $ validTo                          <chr> "2026-04-28T22:00:00+00:00"
#> $ version                          <chr> "1.0.0"
#> $ description.en                   <chr> "This mapping table associates the i…
#> $ name.en                          <chr> "Mapping Geo Focus to ISO 3166-1 Alph…
#> $ publisher.homePage               <chr> "https://www.deza.admin.ch"
#> $ publisher.id                     <chr> "4d5cd931-fabe-46b6-b9af-c48075679f5d"
#> $ publisher.identifier             <chr> "CH_DEZA"
#> $ publisher.spatial                <list> "CH"
#> $ publisher.spatialCH              <list> [<data.frame[1 x 6]>]
#> $ publisher.subAgents              <list> []
#> $ publisher.classification.code    <chr> "0220"
#> $ publisher.classification.name.de <chr> "Verwaltungseinheit des Bundes"
#> $ publisher.classification.name.en <chr> "Administrative unit of the Confeder…
#> $ publisher.classification.name.fr <chr> "Unité de l’administration fédérale"
#> $ publisher.classification.name.it <chr> "Unità amministrativa della Confeder…
#> $ publisher.name.de                <chr> "Direktion für Entwicklung und Zusamm…
#> $ publisher.name.en                <chr> "Swiss Agency for Development and Coo…
#> $ publisher.name.fr                <chr> "Direction du développement et de la…
#> $ publisher.name.it                <chr> "Direzione dello sviluppo e della coo…
#> $ publisher.prefLabel.de           <chr> "DEZA"
#> $ publisher.prefLabel.en           <chr> "SDC"
#> $ publisher.prefLabel.fr           <chr> "DDC"
#> $ publisher.prefLabel.it           <chr> "DSC"
#> $ publisher.system.createdAt       <chr> "2025-03-26T15:57:55.817814+00:00"
#> $ publisher.system.modifiedAt      <chr> "2025-09-18T10:10:24.318819+00:00"
#> $ system.createdAt                 <chr> "2026-04-27T08:37:03.703464+00:00"
#> $ system.modifiedAt                <chr> "2026-04-29T07:46:17.284958+00:00"
#> $ source.uri                       <chr> "https://register.ld.admin.ch/i14y/co…
#> $ target.uri                       <chr> "https://register.ld.admin.ch/i14y/co…

Concepts 

i14y_list_concepts(page = 1, pageSize = 10) |>
  glimpse()
#> Rows: 10
#> Columns: 38
#> $ codeListEntryValueMaxLength <int> 30, 30, 30, 30, 30, 30, 30, 30, 30, 30
#> $ codeListEntryValueType      <chr> "String", "String", "String", "String", "S…
#> $ conceptType                 <chr> "CodeList", "CodeList", "CodeList", "CodeL…
#> $ conformsTo                  <list> [], [], [], [], [], [], [], [], [], []
#> $ id                          <chr> "08dd632d-a98d-34ff-9252-123e46d6f053", "0…
#> $ identifier                  <chr> "2.16.756.5.30.1.127.3.10.1.1.4", "2.16.7…
#> $ identifiers                 <list> "2.16.756.5.30.1.127.3.10.1.1.4", "2.16.75…
#> $ isLocked                    <lgl> FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, …
#> $ keywords                    <list> [], [], [], [], [], [], [], [], [], []
#> $ publicationLevel            <chr> "Public", "Public", "Public", "Public", "…
#> $ registrationStatus          <chr> "Recorded", "Recorded", "Recorded", "Recor…
#> $ themes                      <list> [], [], [], [], [], [], [], [], [], []
#> $ validFrom                   <chr> "2024-06-01T00:00:00+00:00", "2024-06-01T…
#> $ version                     <chr> "2.0.0", "2.0.0", "2.0.0", "2.0.0", "2.0.0…
#> $ description.de              <chr> "Spezialisierung des Autors gemäss Anhang …
#> $ description.en              <chr> "Speciality of the author as per Annex 3.…
#> $ description.fr              <chr> "Spécialisation de l'auteur selon l'annexe…
#> $ description.it              <chr> "Specializzazione dell'autore secondo l' A…
#> $ name.de                     <chr> "DocumentEntry.author.authorSpeciality", "…
#> $ name.en                     <chr> "DocumentEntry.author.authorSpeciality", "…
#> $ name.fr                     <chr> "DocumentEntry.author.authorSpeciality", "…
#> $ name.it                     <chr> "DocumentEntry.author.authorSpeciality", "…
#> $ publisher.id                <chr> "6fc9ea64-2a0e-44df-8c8b-5fb5528faa16", "6…
#> $ publisher.identifier        <chr> "CH_eHealth", "CH_eHealth", "CH_eHealth", …
#> $ publisher.spatial           <list> "CH", "CH", "CH", "CH", "CH", "CH", "CH", …
#> $ publisher.spatialCH         <list> [], [], [], [], [], [], [], [], [], []
#> $ publisher.subAgents         <list> [], [], [], [], [], [], [], [], [], []
#> $ publisher.name.de           <chr> "eHealth Suisse", "eHealth Suisse", "eHeal…
#> $ publisher.name.en           <chr> "eHealth Suisse", "eHealth Suisse", "eHeal…
#> $ publisher.name.fr           <chr> "eHealth Suisse", "eHealth Suisse", "eHeal…
#> $ publisher.name.it           <chr> "eHealth Suisse", "eHealth Suisse", "eHea…
#> $ publisher.prefLabel.de      <chr> "eHealth Suisse", "eHealth Suisse", "eHea…
#> $ publisher.prefLabel.en      <chr> "eHealth Suisse", "eHealth Suisse", "eHea…
#> $ publisher.prefLabel.fr      <chr> "eHealth Suisse", "eHealth Suisse", "eHeal…
#> $ publisher.prefLabel.it      <chr> "eHealth Suisse", "eHealth Suisse", "eHeal…
#> $ publisher.system.createdAt  <chr> "0001-01-01T00:00:00+00:00", "0001-01-01T0…
#> $ publisher.system.modifiedAt <chr> "2023-03-31T07:44:04.672787+00:00", "2023-…
#> $ system.createdAt            <chr> "2025-05-07T16:16:51.799821+00:00", "2025-…

All of them accept the same facet-style filters: publisherIdentifier, publicationLevel ("Internal" or "Public"), and registrationStatus (one of Incomplete, Candidate, Recorded, Qualified, Standard, PreferredStandard, Superseded, Retired). Dataset-shaped resources additionally accept accessRights, and mapping tables accept codeSystemUri and version.

Getting a single resource

Each list endpoint has a matching get function:

dataset <- i14y_get_dataset(id = "b902add5-9538-47ed-b663-f9fbfac92381")
dataset$title$en
#> [1] "Set di dati SpiGes (file di dati)"
dataset$registrationStatus
#> [1] "Recorded"

Each resource type has its own get function:

ds_id <- i14y_list_dataservices()$id[1]
dataservice <- i14y_get_dataservice(id = ds_id)
dataservice$title$en
#> [1] "VOSTRA person search web service"

ps_id <- i14y_list_publicservices()$id[1]
publicservice <- i14y_get_publicservice(id = ps_id)
publicservice$title$en
#> NULL

Mapping tables expose their full metadata (source/target codelists, publisher, version, …) via i14y_get_mappingtable():

mt_id <- i14y_list_mappingtables()$id[1]
mt <- i14y_get_mappingtable(id = mt_id)
mt$name$en
#> [1] "Mapping Geo Focus to ISO 3166-1 Alpha-2"
mt$source$uri
#> [1] "https://register.ld.admin.ch/i14y/concept/geo-focus/version/1.0.0"
mt$target$uri
#> [1] "https://register.ld.admin.ch/i14y/concept/iso-3166-1-alpha2/version/1.0.0"

The actual code-to-code relations of a mapping table (source/target/relation-type triples) are exported with i14y_get_mappingtable_relations(). The default format = "Json" returns a tidy data.frame; format = "Csv" returns the raw CSV as a character string.

relations <- i14y_get_mappingtable_relations(id = mt_id)
head(relations)
#> # A tibble: 6 × 7
#>   source.uri  target.uri relationType.code relationType.uri relationType.name.de
#>   <chr>       <chr>      <chr>             <chr>            <chr>               
#> 1 https://re… https://r… skos:exactMatch   http://www.w3.o… exakte Übereinstimm…
#> 2 https://re… https://r… skos:exactMatch   http://www.w3.o… exakte Übereinstimm…
#> 3 https://re… https://r… skos:exactMatch   http://www.w3.o… exakte Übereinstimm…
#> 4 https://re… https://r… skos:exactMatch   http://www.w3.o… exakte Übereinstimm…
#> 5 https://re… https://r… skos:exactMatch   http://www.w3.o… exakte Übereinstimm…
#> 6 https://re… https://r… skos:exactMatch   http://www.w3.o… exakte Übereinstimm…
#> # ℹ 2 more variables: relationType.name.en <chr>, relationType.name.fr <chr>

Catalogs and DCAT export

Resources on I14Y belong to one or more catalogs (typically one per federal office or cantonal organization). List them with:

catalogs <- i14y_list_catalogs()
head(catalogs[, c("id", "title.en")], 5)
#> # A tibble: 5 × 2
#>   id                                   title.en                                 
#>   <chr>                                <chr>                                    
#> 1 8ec39bcd-9f7c-4dd5-b0c9-ce69e2aafb39 Federal Office of Topography swisstopo O…
#> 2 b1d443a5-535d-4b1d-92d3-9244091a63ca eHealth Suisse Opendata.swiss            
#> 3 cc98af80-593a-41a5-93e7-99ed454721f0 Federal Tax Administration AFC Opendata.…
#> 4 32c0a9c1-df9f-4426-8c48-8a2ea2410f34 Federal Office of Justice FOJ Opendata.s…
#> 5 950e523a-8f5c-42dc-b512-6d2e402e4ab0 NL Opendata.swiss

For a single catalog, you can fetch its metadata or download the whole catalog as a DCAT/RDF or DCAT/TTL document:

catalog_id <- catalogs$id[1]

catalog <- i14y_get_catalog(id = catalog_id)
catalog$title$en
#> [1] "Federal Office of Topography swisstopo Opendata.swiss"

dcat_ttl <- i14y_get_catalog_dcat(id = catalog_id, format = "TTL")
cat(substr(dcat_ttl, 1, 500))
#> @base <https://i14y.admin.ch/resources/dcat/catalogs/8ec39bcd-9f7c-4dd5-b0c9-ce69e2aafb39>.
#> 
#> @prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>.
#> @prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>.
#> @prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>.
#> @prefix dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>.
#> @prefix vcard: <http://www.w3.org/2006/vcard/ns#>.
#> @prefix dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>.
#> @prefix foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>.
#> @prefix spdx: <http://spdx.org/rdf/terms#>.
#> @prefix dcatap: <

The TTL/RDF export is the canonical format for harvesting I14Y into other metadata systems (CKAN, opendata.swiss, custom triple-stores).

Each catalog also exposes the individual records (one per resource listed in the catalog) via i14y_get_catalog_records(). Not every catalog has records — many federal catalogs are currently empty — so pick one that does, for example the NL Opendata.swiss catalog:

records_catalog_id <- catalogs$id[catalogs$title.en == "NL Opendata.swiss"][1]
records <- i14y_get_catalog_records(id = records_catalog_id)
str(records, max.level = 1)
#> tibble [14 × 5] (S3: tbl_df/tbl/data.frame)

Each record points at an underlying resource (dataset, data service, …) through primaryTopic.resourceId and primaryTopic.resourceType, which you can then fetch with the matching i14y_get_*() function:

records[, c("id", "primaryTopic.resourceId", "primaryTopic.resourceType")] |>
  head(3)
#> # A tibble: 3 × 3
#>   id                               primaryTopic.resourc…¹ primaryTopic.resourc…²
#>   <chr>                            <chr>                  <chr>                 
#> 1 0c352cf6-b3c9-478e-8b32-f89d9b3… 0699e542-e6f0-4038-be… Dataset               
#> 2 1c7a458c-1d8d-449c-8d6b-bb06df9… 21d9c29e-7a21-4deb-97… Dataset               
#> 3 2c03f216-f40d-41be-95b7-c9461b8… 96857d76-0ddc-4721-99… Dataset               
#> # ℹ abbreviated names: ¹​primaryTopic.resourceId, ²​primaryTopic.resourceType

The single-record endpoint i14y_get_catalog_record(id, recordId) exists but currently requires authentication on the public API (HTTP 401 for anonymous callers), so we don’t show a live call here.

Putting it together: finding all preferred-standard NOGA-related concepts 

i14y_search(
  query = "NOGA",
  language = "en",
  types = "Concept",
  conceptValueTypes = "CodeList",
  registrationStatuses = "PreferredStandard",
  pageSize = 10
)
#> # A tibble: 7 × 56
#>   businessEvents conceptType formats    id                 identifier lifeEvents
#>   <list>         <chr>       <list>     <chr>              <chr>      <list>    
#> 1 <list [0]>     CodeList    <list [0]> 08dc481b-2add-123… nogaCode   <list [0]>
#> 2 <list [0]>     CodeList    <list [0]> 001bfaa8-fa57-4d6… nogaCode   <list [0]>
#> 3 <list [0]>     CodeList    <list [0]> 08d94603-f490-f09… NOGA_SECT… <list [0]>
#> 4 <list [0]>     CodeList    <list [0]> 08d94604-db03-190… NOGA_CLASS <list [0]>
#> 5 <list [0]>     CodeList    <list [0]> 08d94604-e058-62a… NOGA_DIVI… <list [0]>
#> 6 <list [0]>     CodeList    <list [0]> 08d94604-e5ac-f85… NOGA_GROUP <list [0]>
#> 7 <list [0]>     CodeList    <list [0]> 08d94604-f12a-5d8… NOGA_TYPE  <list [0]>
#> # ℹ 50 more variables: publicationLevel <chr>, registrationStatus <chr>,
#> #   themes <list>, type <chr>, validFrom <chr>, version <chr>,
#> #   structureReferencesCount <int>, description.de <chr>, description.en <chr>,
#> #   description.fr <chr>, description.it <chr>, publisher.homePage <chr>,
#> #   publisher.id <chr>, publisher.identifier <chr>, publisher.spatial <list>,
#> #   publisher.spatialCH <list>, publisher.subAgents <list>,
#> #   publisher.uid <chr>, publisher.classification.code <chr>, …

From here, the steps of the vignette("codelists-with-bfs") workflow apply: take any id, call i14y_get_codelist(), and join.

On this page

Developed by Felix Luginbuhl.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
